name: Shift 2 Unleashed
notes: Xbox 360 controller button prompts by Garcias-Garage.de — single pak swap, 'Updated Version for Patch 01'. Original kept as BOOTFLOW.bff.gfm-orig. Game is delisted from Steam; appid 47920 is best-effort — if detection misses on the Deck, the path prompt covers it (and remembers). Not installed on the Windows PC (2026-07-06), so unverified against a real install; sha256 of payload: 3678f1bc9a79124f3d5c0ecd716103e72ab7e545d4fc54293284972fd91989d1.
